channel.title: Contribute on Open Component Model
channel.description: Recent content in Contribute on Open Component Model
channel.copyright: © Copyright 2024, SAP SE and Open Component Model Contributors

item.title: Contributing Guideline
item.description:
Welcome to the OCM community!

Thank you for taking the time to contribute to OCM.

  • DCO
  • Support Channels
  • Ways to Contribute
    • Find an Issue
  • Local Development
  • Submitting Pull Requests
    • Licensing and Copyright information on file level
    • Pull Request Checklist
    • Pull Request Process
    • Style Guidelines
  • Release Process
  • Guideline for AI-generated code contributions to SAP Open Source Software Projects

DCO

By contributing to this project you agree to the Developer Certificate of Origin (DCO). This document was created by the Linux Kernel community and is a simple statement that you, as a contributor, have the legal right to make the contribution.

item.title: Security Guideline
item.description:
Report a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues!
